title: The Atlas Connection
content: You spend hours cross-referencing Miller's bank deposits with the Atlas internal audit Sterling left you. The pieces fit with terrifying precision.||A payment of £50,000 was made to a shell company owned by Miller's brother-in-law. The source? A subsidiary of the Atlas Foundation.||Miller didn't just close the case because of laziness. He was paid to look the other way while Atlas cleaned up the digital trail.||📝 FILES UPDATED: Miller's bribery record logged.
